Race.Name: Human (Standard)
Race.Stats: STR+1, DEX+1, CON+1, INT+1, WIS+1, CHA+1
Race.Description: Gain +1 to all ability scores. Humans are the most adaptable and ambitious among the common races.

Race.Name: Human (Variant)
Race.Description: Gain +1 to two different scores of your choice, one skill proficiency, and one Feat at Level 1.

Race.Name: Dwarf (Hill)
Race.Passives: Darkvision, Dwarven Resilience, Dwarven Toughness, Stonecunning, Tool Proficiency
Race.Description: Gain +2 CON and +1 WIS. Dwarven Toughness: +1 Max HP per level.

Race.Name: Dwarf (Mountain)
Race.Passives: Darkvision, Dwarven Resilience, Dwarven Armor Training, Stonecunning
Race.Description: Gain +2 CON and +2 STR. You have proficiency with light and medium armor.

Race.Name: Elf (High)
Race.Passives: Darkvision, Fey Ancestry, Trance, Keen Senses, Elf Weapon Training
Race.Description: Gain +2 DEX and +1 INT. Choose 1 Cantrip from the Wizard list (INT is casting stat).

Race.Name: Elf (Wood)
Race.Passives: Darkvision, Fey Ancestry, Trance, Mask of the Wild, Fleet of Foot
Race.Description: Gain +2 DEX and +1 WIS. Base walking speed increases to 35 feet. Can attempt to hide even when only lightly obscured.

Race.Name: Halfling (Lightfoot)
Race.Passives: Lucky, Brave, Halfling Nimbleness, Naturally Stealthy
Race.Description: Gain +2 DEX and +1 CHA. Lucky: Reroll 1s on d20. Can hide behind creatures one size larger than you.

Race.Name: Halfling (Stout)
Race.Passives: Lucky, Brave, Halfling Nimbleness, Stout Resilience
Race.Description: Gain +2 DEX and +1 CON. Stout Resilience: Advantage/Resistance vs Poison.

Race.Name: Dragonborn
Race.Passives: Draconic Ancestry, Breath Weapon, Damage Resistance
Race.Description: Gain +2 STR and +1 CHA. Resistance and Breath Weapon element determined by chosen Dragon Ancestor.

Race.Name: Gnome (Rock)
Race.Passives: Darkvision, Gnome Cunning, Artificer's Lore, Tinker
Race.Description: Gain +2 INT and +1 CON. Gnome Cunning: Advantage on INT/WIS/CHA saves vs Magic.

Race.Name: Half-Elf
Race.Description: Gain +2 CHA and +1 to two other scores of your choice. Gain proficiency in two skills of your choice.

Race.Name: Half-Orc
Race.Passives: Darkvision, Menacing, Relentless Endurance, Savage Attacks
Race.Description: Gain +2 STR and +1 CON. Relentless Endurance: Drop to 1 HP instead of 0 once per long rest. Savage Attacks: Extra damage die on melee crits.

Race.Name: Tiefling
Race.Description: Gain +2 CHA and +1 INT. Resistance to Fire. Unlocks Infernal spells at levels 1, 3, and 5.
